title: BEM-951 executor path repair
objective: BEM-951 | Repair codex-runner executor path. Diagnose why BEM-948, BEM-949 and BEM-950 completed with changed_files only governance/codex/proofs/*.txt and commit_sha=null despite code_patch objectives requesting repository files. Inspect .github/workflows/codex-runner.yml and governance/codex/PYTHON_EXECUTOR_GUIDE.md. Create governance/reports/BEM951_EXECUTOR_PATH_REPAIR.md documenting root cause and exact patch. If safe, patch codex-runner.yml so Python executor Run script tasks can create requested repository files, git add all changed governance files, commit, safe push, and write non-null commit_sha to governance/codex/results/<trace_id>.json. Add or update a minimal selftest task/report path if existing conventions support it. Never write issue #31. No schedule triggers. No secrets. No release PASS. No issue comments.
